title: Snap's stock jumps 9% on plans to axe 16% of its workforce citing AI efficiencies
summary: Snap announced plans to lay off 16% of its global workforce citing AI-driven efficiencies, boosting the company's stock 9% in premarket trading. The move underscores how tech companies are leveraging artificial intelligence to reduce headcount while maintaining operations.
content: Snap was up in premarket trading on Wednesday after announcing plans to lay off up to 16% of its global workforce citing AI-driven efficiencies

zh.title: Snap股价上涨9% 计划以AI效率为由裁减16%员工
zh.summary: Snap宣布计划以AI驱动的效率提升为由裁减全球员工的16%，推动该公司股票在盘前交易中上涨9%。此举突显了科技公司如何利用人工智能在保持运营的同时减少人员。

title: Morgan Stanley beats Wall Street earnings forecasts — by a long way
summary: Morgan Stanley surpassed Wall Street earnings expectations with EPS of $3.43, significantly beating the consensus forecast of $3.02. The banking giant's strong quarter demonstrates sustained strength in the financial sector.
content: The banking giant posted earnings per share of $3.43, compared to forecasts of $3.02.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利盈利大幅超越华尔街预期
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利每股收益达3.43美元，远超华尔街共识预期的3.02美元。这家银行巨头的强劲季度表现证明了金融部门持续的强势。

title: April 15 is tax deadline day — and here’s why it’s also important for the stock market
summary: April 15 marks the tax filing deadline, and researchers warn investors are about to lose a financial cushion that has supported stock market gains for months. The timing could have significant implications for near-term market dynamics.
content: Investors are about to lose a financial cushion that’s been supporting the stock market for months, warns Strategas researchers.

zh.title: 4月15日是税务申报截止日——及其对股市的重要意义
zh.summary: 4月15日是税务申报截止日期，研究人员警告投资者将失去一个在过去数月支撑股市涨幅的财务缓冲。这个时机可能对近期市场动态产生重大影响。

title: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
summary: Trump accounts have registered 5 million children, with 1.2 million eligible to receive $1,000 in seed money, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. The program aims to provide financial benefits to eligible families.
content: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.

zh.title: 特朗普账户注册500万名儿童，120万人有资格获得1000美元种子资金，贝塞特表示
zh.summary: 根据财政部长斯科特·贝塞特称，特朗普账户已注册500万名儿童，其中120万人有资格获得1000美元种子资金。该计划旨在向符合条件的家庭提供经济福利。

title: Why BLTs and salad just got more expensive — tariffs, war send tomato prices soaring
summary: Tomato prices have surged in recent months, driven primarily by trade policy and geopolitical tensions. The sharp increases are making common food items like BLTs and salads noticeably more expensive for consumers.
content: Tomato prices have risen sharply in recent months, driven largely by trade policy, economists said.

zh.title: 为什么BLT和沙拉变贵了——关税和战争导致番茄价格飙升
zh.summary: 近几个月番茄价格飙升，主要由贸易政策和地缘政治紧张局势推动。价格大幅上涨使BLT和沙拉等常见食物对消费者来说明显更贵了。

title: Big Tech’s giant headache: billions in AI capital spending means investors demand results
summary: Major tech companies are investing billions in AI, creating intense investor expectations for measurable returns on that spending. The massive capital deployment carries significant implementation risks tied to AI's transformative but uncertain potential.
content: Implementing AI carries plenty of risks — most of which stem from its tremendous potential.

zh.title: 大科技公司的大麻烦：数十亿美元的AI资本支出意味着投资者要求回报
zh.summary: 大型科技公司正在向AI投入数十亿美元，这为该支出的可衡量回报创造了激烈的投资者期望。这种大规模资本部署带来了与AI变革性但不确定潜力相关的重大实施风险。

title: Power Insider: The markets are obsessed with the Strait of Hormuz. Why it matters less than you think
summary: Retail and professional traders closely monitor traffic in the Strait of Hormuz seeking to predict oil price movements. However, analysts argue this focus substantially overstates the strait's actual influence on global oil markets.
content: Retail and pro traders are obsessed with gauging the traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, thinking they can gain an edge on where oil prices are going. They can’t.

zh.title: 权力内幕：市场痴迷于霍尔木兹海峡。为什么它的重要性没有你想的那么大
zh.summary: 零售和专业交易员密切监控霍尔木兹海峡的交通流量以预测油价变动。但分析人士辩称，这种关注大大高估了该海峡对全球石油市场的实际影响。

title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
summary: Bank of America exceeded earnings expectations for the 23rd consecutive quarter, with CEO Brian Moynihan characterizing consumer banking as healthy. The results from the second-largest U.S. bank by assets reinforce sector strength.
content: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.

zh.title: 美国银行超过预期，CEO布莱恩·莫伊尼汉称消费者银行业务"健康"
zh.summary: 美国银行连续第23个季度超过收益预期，CEO布莱恩·莫伊尼汉将消费者银行业务描述为健康状态。这家美国资产第二大银行的财报结果强化了该行业的强势。

title: Walmart is refreshing the look of Great Value, its largest private label brand
summary: Walmart is redesigning Great Value, its largest private label brand, with a more modern and colorful appearance. The refresh reflects broader retail investment in private label as competition in the discount segment intensifies.
content: The nation's largest grocer is giving the brand a more modern and colorful spin as other retailers invest in private label.

zh.title: 沃尔玛正在刷新其最大自有品牌Great Value的形象
zh.summary: 沃尔玛正在重新设计其最大的自有品牌Great Value，采用更现代和丰富多彩的外观。这次刷新反映了零售业在自有品牌上的更广泛投资，因为折扣市场竞争日益激烈。

title: Starbucks launches beta app in ChatGPT to fuel new drink discovery
summary: Starbucks launched a beta app integrated with ChatGPT to help customers discover new beverages. The initiative aims to drive traffic back to Starbucks cafes amid broader efforts to boost U.S. customer engagement.
content: Starbucks is trying to find ways to entice U.S. customers back to its cafes.

zh.title: 星巴克在ChatGPT推出测试版应用促进新饮品发现
zh.summary: 星巴克推出了与ChatGPT整合的测试版应用，帮助顾客发现新饮品。该举措旨在吸引顾客回到星巴克门店，是提升美国顾客参与度的更广泛努力的一部分。

title: Top Energy Democrat probes Trump administration's preparations for Strait of Hormuz closure
summary: A leading Democratic energy official is investigating the Trump administration's preparedness for a potential Strait of Hormuz closure. The strait has been effectively closed since U.S. military operations against Iran began, causing energy price spikes and significant market volatility.
content: The strait has been effectively closed since the U.S. launched a war with Iran, spiking energy prices and whipsawing markets.

zh.title: 民主党高级能源官员调查特朗普政府对霍尔木兹海峡关闭的准备
zh.summary: 一位民主党高级能源官员正在调查特朗普政府对潜在霍尔木兹海峡关闭的准备。自美国对伊朗的军事行动开始以来，该海峡已实际关闭，导致能源价格飙升和显著的市场波动。

title: Major stock-market indexes approach ‘overbought’ territory after swift rally
summary: Major stock indexes are approaching overbought conditions following a swift market rally. Historical momentum indicators suggest indices could experience notable pullbacks in the coming weeks.
content: Last time momentum measures were this high indices saw notable pullbacks in the next few weeks

zh.title: 主要股市指数在迅速上涨后接近超买区域
zh.summary: 主要股市指数在迅速上升后接近超买状况。历史动量指标表明这些指数在未来几周内可能经历显著回调。

title: These stocks and ETFs can beat the ‘sell in May’ slump — and dodge the 2026 midterm blues
summary: Market strategists recommend targeted stock and ETF selections to navigate the traditional summer slowdown and 2026 midterm election volatility. Investors can maintain market participation without fully exiting positions through careful security selection.
content: You don’t have to exit the market to survive a summer lull. Here’s your ‘stay and play’ strategy for the 2026 election cycle.

zh.title: 这些股票和ETF可以战胜"五月卖出"低迷——并规避2026年中期选举困境
zh.summary: 市场策略师建议有针对性地选择股票和ETF，以应对传统的夏季低迷和2026年中期选举波动。投资者可以通过谨慎的证券选择，在不完全退出头寸的情况下保持市场参与度。

title: Bank of America’s 30% jump in equities revenue helps power an earnings beat
summary: Bank of America's equities revenue jumped 30%, contributing significantly to its earnings beat. The strong quarter was bolstered by elevated market volatility and an increasingly favorable regulatory environment.
content: Bank of America’s good quarter was helped by volatility and an easier regulatory environment.

zh.title: 美洲银行股票收入增长30%助力盈利超预期
zh.summary: 美洲银行的股票收入增长了30%，对其盈利超预期做出了重大贡献。该强劲季度得到了市场波动加剧和监管环境日益有利的支撑。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, Robinhood & more
summary: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, Robinhood, and other major stocks posted significant premarket movements. The moves reflect investor reactions to earnings announcements and broader market sentiment.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前交易中涨跌最大的股票：美洲银行、摩根士丹利、Robinhood等
zh.summary: 美洲银行、摩根士丹利、Robinhood和其他大型股票在盘前交易中出现重大波动。这些波动反映了投资者对收益公告和更广泛市场情绪的反应。

title: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong
summary: ASML beat Q1 revenue and profit expectations and raised its 2026 sales guidance. The chip maker's outperformance reflects sustained strong demand for AI semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
content: ASML beat first-quarter revenue and profit expectations and raised its sales guidance for 2026.

zh.title: 芯片巨头ASML提高2026年指导预期，AI芯片制造设备需求保持强劲
zh.summary: ASML超越了第一季度的收入和利润预期，并提高了2026年的销售指导。这家芯片制造商的超预期表现反映了对AI芯片制造设备持续强劲的需求。

title: AA fined and ordered to refund learner drivers for hidden fees
summary: The AA and BSM driving schools were fined and ordered to refund customers after failing to disclose booking fees upfront during online transactions. The penalty addresses hidden charges that violated consumer protection standards.
content: The owner of the AA and BSM driving schools failed to disclose fees upfront during online booking.

zh.title: AA被罚款并被命令向学员驾驶员退款，因隐性费用问题
zh.summary: AA和BSM驾驶学校因在线交易中未预先披露预订费用而被罚款并被命令向客户退款。该罚款针对违反消费者保护标准的隐性收费。

title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
summary: Trump renewed criticism of Pope Leo amid ongoing tensions between the White House and Vatican over U.S.-Israel military operations against Iran. The diplomatic spat reflects broader disagreements on regional security strategy.
content: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普再次针对教宗利奥，在称其在打击犯罪方面软弱数天后
zh.summary: 特朗普针对教宗利奥重新批评，此时白宫与梵蒂冈之间在美国-以色列对伊朗的军事行动问题上持续紧张。这一外交争执反映了对地区安全战略的更广泛分歧。

title: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed sentiment as traders evaluate the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran conflict. Market reaction hinges on assessing potential escalation or de-escalation of Middle East tensions.
content: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional traders assess the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲市场关注伊朗战争最新进展，交易员评估开盘走势
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计将以混合情绪开盘，交易员评估美伊冲突最新发展。市场反应取决于对中东紧张局势可能升级或缓解的评估。

title: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase
summary: Samsung SDS shares surged 20% after KKR agreed to purchase $820 million in newly issued convertible bonds. The deal establishes a strategic partnership that could unlock value through alternative asset strategies.
content: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.

zh.title: 三星SDS股价因KKR合作和8.2亿美元债券购买上涨20%
zh.summary: 在KKR同意购买8.2亿美元新发行可转债后，三星SDS股价上涨20%。该交易建立了一个战略合作伙伴关系，可能通过替代资产策略释放价值。

title: Crisis grants launched for struggling families
summary: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness can now apply for emergency financial assistance through newly launched crisis grants. The program provides immediate relief for families facing sudden hardship.
content: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness will be able to apply for help.

zh.title: 为困难家庭推出危机补助金
zh.summary: 布拉德福德居民如果遭遇意外失业或疾病，现在可以申请通过新推出的危机补助金获得紧急财务援助。该计划为面临突然困难的家庭提供即时救济。

title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
summary: The U.S. has completed implementation of its Strait of Hormuz blockade on Iran while simultaneously signaling openness to diplomatic negotiations. This dual approach aims to maximize pressure while preserving paths toward conflict resolution.
content: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

zh.title: 美国称荷尔木兹海峡封锁"已全面实施"，同时向伊朗发出外交缓和信号
zh.summary: 美国已完成对伊朗的荷尔木兹海峡封锁，同时表示愿意进行外交谈判。这种双管齐下的方式旨在最大化施压，同时保留冲突解决的途径。

title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
summary: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks escalating economic pressure on China and India as critical energy markets face disruptions. The spillover tensions highlight how U.S.-Iran conflicts impact America's relationships with major Asian powers.
content: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

zh.title: 特朗普的荷尔木兹封锁将中国、印度置于十字火力之下，美国对伊朗压力蔓延
zh.summary: 美国对荷尔木兹海峡的封锁可能加剧对中国和印度的经济压力，因为关键能源市场面临中断。这种溅射效应凸显美伊冲突如何影响美国与亚洲大国的关系。

title: U.S. crude trades lower as possible Washington-Tehran talks raise hopes for Mideast peace deal
summary: U.S. crude oil prices declined as optimism grew about potential negotiations between Washington, Tehran, and Israel to resolve Middle East tensions. Hopes of restarting talks eased concerns about prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption.
content: Oil prices traded mixed as optimism grew that Iran may restart negotiations with the U.S. and Israel, easing tensions over the conflict that has disrupted the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国原油交易下跌，华盛顿-德黑兰会谈可能性提高了中东和平协议的希望
zh.summary: 随着美伊和以色列进行潜在谈判以解决中东紧张局势的乐观情绪增长，美国原油价格下跌。重启会谈的希望缓解了对荷尔木兹海峡长期中断的担忧。

title: Asia markets open higher as hopes for a U.S.-Iran deal rise and oil prices drop
summary: Asia-Pacific markets gained following overnight U.S. stock gains driven by lower oil prices and optimism around a potential U.S.-Iran deal. The decline in crude reflects easing geopolitical tensions and improved risk sentiment.
content: Asia-Pacific markets track overnight gains in U.S. stocks on lower oil prices amid hopes of a Iran-U.S. deal

zh.title: 随着美伊协议希望增加和油价下跌，亚洲市场高开
zh.summary: 亚太市场在美国股市隔夜上涨的推动下上升，油价下跌和围绕潜在美伊协议的乐观情绪是主要原因。原油价格下跌反映了地缘政治紧张局势的缓解和风险情绪的改善。

title: A new CEO and a deal with Uber aren’t enough to lift this EV maker’s struggling stock
summary: Lucid Motors announced new leadership and a deal with Uber, but investors remain skeptical about the company's financial viability and survival prospects. The move highlights ongoing concerns about the EV maker's path to profitability.
content: The announcement comes amid concerns from investors about Lucid’s ability to stay afloat.

zh.title: 新首席执行官和与优步的交易不足以提振这家电动汽车制造商的低迷股价
zh.summary: 路西德汽车宣布了新的领导层和与优步的交易，但投资者仍对该公司的财务可行性和生存前景持怀疑态度。这一举措突出了人们对这家电动汽车制造商盈利之路的持续担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed as S&P 500 approaches its all-time high: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday trading less than 1% below its January 28 all-time high, with stock futures showing minimal movement. The index continues to hover near record levels amid stable market conditions.
content: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.

zh.title: 随着标普500指数接近历史高点，股指期货变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数周二收盘时较1月28日历史高点下跌不足1%，股指期货涨幅有限。该指数在市场平稳的情况下继续在纪录水平附近徘徊。
